events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: rebar placement, wrong bar size vs. schedule (deformation count/size - ID+DOC). Work is tested/inspected. This is non-compliant - wrong bar size. Decision: fail. Risk: high (structural). Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 90 since tested/inspected. Value: 0 (no numeric reading asked). Confidence high.
